description: Core observable and observableArray notification and mutation behavior.

behaviors.statement: Observables ignore duplicate writes for identical primitives, `null`, and `undefined` by default.
notes: Writing the same object reference still notifies because object equality is treated as changed by default.

behaviors.statement: Setting `equalityComparer = null` or using `extend({ notify: "always" })` forces notifications for unchanged primitive values.
`observableArray.destroy(item)` and `destroyAll(...)` mark `_destroy = true` without removing items from the array.
`observableArray.remove(...)` and `removeAll(...)` remove matching items, return the removed values, and mutate the original array.
notes: No change notification is sent when nothing matches.

behaviors.statement: `observableArray` is iterable and reports as both an observable and an observable array.
